What was the distinction between Germania Inferior and Germania Superior according to the Romans?
mcqs.answer: Germania Inferior was located to the north of the Rhine River, while Germania Superior was located to the south of the Rhine River.
distractors: Germania Inferior was inhabited primarily by the Franks, while Germania Superior was home to the Saxons.

mcqs.question: Who forms the executive power in the Netherlands?
